items.headline: Victor Wembanyama available to play in Game 4 vs. Blazers
items.description: San Antonio's star big man has cleared the NBA's concussion protocol and is available to play in Game 4 in Portland.

items.headline: Live Updates: 2026 NBA Playoffs, R1 | Cavaliers-Raptors begins Sunday's action
items.description: Check out the best of Sunday's action in the 2026 NBA Playoffs with the NBA.com live blog.

items.headline: Starting 5: Ayo drops 43 off bench, 42 for Shai, Knicks get even, Magic go up
items.description: SGA puts OKC up 3-0, Dosunmu downs Denver, KAT’s first Playoff triple-double evens series, Paolo’s Magic go up 2-1 on 1-seed Pistons.

items.headline: 3 things to watch in Celtics-Sixers Game 4
items.description: Could Joel Embiid return in time to swing the balance? Who will win the 3-point battle? Can the 76ers find easy buckets?

items.headline: Timberwolves lose Anthony Edwards, Donte DiVincenzo to leg injuries in Game 4
items.description: DiVincenzo’s season is over with an Achilles tendon injury and the severity of Edwards’ left knee injury remains unclear.

items.headline: 3 things to watch in Spurs-Trail Blazers Game 4
items.description: Portland has plenty to work on and a quick turnaround to consider as it gears up for a crucial Game 4 at home.

items.headline: 4 takeaways: Ayo Dosunmu delivers amid Timberwolves injuries in Game 4
items.description: Ayo Dosunmu etches himself in the playoff record books, the Wolves are left worrying over injuries & more from Game 4.

items.headline: 4 takeaways: Knicks-Hawks Game 4 sends an even series back to MSG
items.description: Karl-Anthony Towns comes up big, OG Anunoby is masterful and more from the Knicks' series-leveling victory in Atlanta.

items.headline: 4 takeaways: Pistons-Magic Game 3 leaves Detroit stunned after Orlando re-takes series lead
items.description: Momentum is gained and flipped on its head, Tobias Harris offers a path forward, and more from the Magic's Game 3 win.

items.headline: 4 takeaways: Shai Gilgeous-Alexander dominates Thunder-Suns Game 3 & OKC nears sweep
items.description: Shai Gilgeous-Alexander's mid-range madness reaches new heights, the league's top bench delivers & more from Game 3.

items.headline: 3 things to watch in Lakers-Rockets Game 4
items.description: Will Kevin Durant make a timely return in Game 4? The Rockets could use the boost as they attempt to head off a Lakers sweep.

items.headline: Kevin Durant improving but status for Game 4 is unknown
items.description: Coach Ime Udoka says Kevin Durant is getting treatment "around the clock" as Houston closes in on a must-win Game 4.

items.headline: 4 things to watch in Cavaliers-Raptors Game 4
items.description: Toronto is starting to find its footing, which puts Cleveland in a challenging spot as Game 4 approaches.

items.headline: 3 things to watch in Nuggets-Wolves Game 4
items.description: Fatigue for Nikola Jokić and Denver's depth will take center stage for the Nuggets as they look to rebound in Game 4.

items.headline: Live Updates: 2026 NBA Playoffs, R1 | Wolves, Knicks, Magic and Thunder Win
items.description: Enjoy the best of Saturday's action in the 2026 NBA Playoffs with the NBA.com live blog.
